revision.text: <includeonly>|}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|Template:Ahnentafel/doc}} [[cy:NodynAkah Lakah Backah Street:Ahnentafel diwedd]] [[tl:Template:Ahnentafel bottom]] [[zh:Template:Ahnentafel bottom]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected Template:Ahnentafel bottom: [[WP:HRT|Highly visible template]] on [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Unprotected templates with many transclusions/1]]. Changes can be requested at [[WP:RFUP]] using [[WP:TW|TW]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop]

Unprotected Template:Ahnentafel bottom: Consensus at [[WP:ANI]] appears to be that these should be unprotected. Unprotecting without prejudice to new consensus emerging at [[WT:HRT]]: I won't consider it wheel-warring if anyone re-protects, etc. using [[W
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/66.204.141.62|66.204.141.62]] ([[User talk:66.204.141.62|talk]]) to last revision by TFOWR ([[WP:HG|HG]])
[[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/MoreYellow|MoreYellow]] ([[User talk:MoreYellow|talk]]) to last version by Amonet
Protected Template:Ahnentafel bottom: [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High risk template]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
Changed protection level of Template:Ahnentafel bottom: allow template editors to modify ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))
Removed 4 sitelinks migrated to [[d:Q5616054|an item]] on [[WP:WDATA|Wikidata]]

Protected "[[Template:Chart bottom]]": [[WP:SEMI|semi-protecting]] highly-visible templates in response to recent template-space vandalism ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (...
Per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2018 March 21#Template:Ahnentafel-compact4]], added {{being deleted}} ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
Plastikspork moved page [[Template:Ahnentafel bottom]] to [[Template:Chart bottom]]: History merge
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>|}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|Template:Chart top/doc}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "<!--Doing this to bump these pages because my history retrieval attempts have led to category caching errors-->" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chart_bottom here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chart_bottom for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>|}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|Template:Chart top/doc}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
